name: Generate Random Float Value
short_description: Generates a random floating-point number within a specified range [low, high], rounded to two decimal places. This is a utility function often used to create variable inputs for other models.

inputs.name: low
inputs.description: The lower bound (inclusive) for the random value generation.

inputs.name: high
inputs.description: The upper bound (inclusive) for the random value generation.

name: Large Transfer Whale Detection
short_description: Detects a 'whale' transaction by calculating the excess amount of a transfer over a predefined threshold.

inputs.name: transfer_amount
inputs.description: The amount of cryptocurrency transferred in a transaction.

inputs.name: threshold
inputs.description: The predefined amount that flags a transfer as a whale transaction.

name: Wallet Activity Whale Detection (Basic)
short_description: Calculates the ratio of a wallet's transfer amount to a predefined whale detection threshold.

inputs.name: transfer_amount
inputs.description: The amount of cryptocurrency transferred in a single transaction.

inputs.name: threshold
inputs.description: The predefined threshold for detecting whale activity.

name: Multi-transaction Whale Detection Analysis
short_description: Analyzes multiple cryptocurrency transactions to determine the total amount exceeding a specified whale detection threshold.

inputs.name: threshold
inputs.description: The whale detection threshold for each individual transaction.

name: Whale Detection: Variable Threshold Adjustment
short_description: Calculates the excess amount of a transaction over a whale detection threshold that is adjusted by a given percentage factor.

inputs.name: factor
inputs.description: The percentage adjustment factor for the threshold (e.g., 5 for 5%, -2 for -2%).

name: Cross-Exchange Whale Transaction Impact
short_description: Calculates the net excess of a cross-exchange transfer amount over a whale detection threshold, after accounting for exchange fees.

inputs.name: amount
inputs.description: The initial transfer amount between exchanges.

inputs.name: fee_percent
inputs.description: The percentage fee applied by the receiving exchange.
